slides.title: Always hungry? *Here's why*.
slides.sub: If you're hungry an hour after eating, the problem usually isn't willpower.

slides.title: Too little protein
slides.body: Protein is the most *filling macro*. Skimp on it and the hunger comes right back.

slides.title: Liquid calories
slides.body: Drinks *don't trigger fullness*. You sip 300 calories and feel like you ate nothing.

slides.title: You're under-slept
slides.body: One short night spikes your *hunger hormones* the next day. It's biology, not weakness.

slides.title: Not enough fiber
slides.body: Refined carbs digest fast and leave you empty. *Fiber* is what keeps you satisfied.

slides.title: Eating too fast
slides.body: Fullness signals take *20 minutes*. Slow down and you'll need less to feel done.

slides.title: Get full and *stay full*.
slides.body: Vibe Health shows how your meals, sleep & water affect your hunger — so you can fix the real cause.

caption:
Always hungry an hour after eating? It's rarely willpower. 🍽️

Low protein, liquid calories, short sleep, no fiber, eating too fast — usually it's one of these five. Save this and check yourself. 🔖

Vibe Health ties your meals, sleep & water to your hunger → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why You're Always Hungry (And How to Fix It)
